scripts.postinstall: cd client && npm install && cd .. && cd server && npm install
scripts.lint: cd client && npm run lint && cd .. && cd server && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd client && npm run lint:fix && cd .. && cd server && npm run lint:fix
scripts.test: cd client && npm run test && cd .. && cd server && npm run test
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules && npm cache clean --force
